schema_diagram.description: Entity-Relationship diagram showing database schema and relationships
schema_diagram.content:
erDiagram
    SCHOOLS ||--o{ FRPM : "has"
    SCHOOLS ||--o{ SATSCORES : "has"

    FRPM {
        text CDSCode PK,FK
        text Academic Year
        text County Code
        int District Code
        text School Code
        text County Name
        text District Name
        text School Name
        text District Type
        text School Type
        text Educational Option Type
        text NSLP Provision Status
        int Charter School (Y/N)
        text Charter School Number
        text Charter Funding Type
        int IRC
        text Low Grade
        text High Grade
        float Enrollment (K-12)
        float Free Meal Count (K-12)
        float Percent (%) Eligible Free (K-12)
        float FRPM Count (K-12)
        float Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (K-12)
        float Enrollment (Ages 5-17)
        float Free Meal Count (Ages 5-17)
        float Percent (%) Eligible Free (Ages 5-17)
        float FRPM Count (Ages 5-17)
        float Percent (%) Eligible FRPM (Ages 5-17)
        int 2013-14 CALPADS Fall 1 Certification Status
    }
    SCHOOLS {
        text CDSCode PK
        text NCESDist
        text NCESSchool
        text StatusType
        text County
        text District
        text School
        text Street
        text StreetAbr
        text City
        text Zip
        text State
        text MailStreet
        text MailStrAbr
        text MailCity
        text MailZip
        text MailState
        text Phone
        text Ext
        text Website
        datetime OpenDate
        datetime ClosedDate
        int Charter
        text CharterNum
        text FundingType
        text DOC
        text DOCType
        text SOC
        text SOCType
        text EdOpsCode
        text EdOpsName
        text EILCode
        text EILName
        text GSoffered
        text GSserved
        text Virtual
        int Magnet
        float Latitude
        float Longitude
        text AdmFName1
        text AdmLName1
        text AdmEmail1
        text AdmFName2
        text AdmLName2
        text AdmEmail2
        text AdmFName3
        text AdmLName3
        text AdmEmail3
        datetime LastUpdate
    }
    SATSCORES {
        text cds PK,FK
        text rtype
        text sname
        text dname
        text cname
        int enroll12
        int NumTstTakr
        int AvgScrRead
        int AvgScrMath
        int AvgScrWrite
        int NumGE1500
    }

schools.description: The schools table provides comprehensive information on educational institutions, including their operational status, funding type, grade levels offered, magnet and charter designations, and whether they are virtual or physical, supporting analysis of school characteristics and trends across the U.S. education system.
